subject: Re: Helical refinement in M
body:
Yes. Recommend reprocessing your subset data (with target assemblies) in
warptools

Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK


On Fri, 14 Nov 2025 at 12:43, Charlie <charlie.lovatt.rfi@gmail.com> wrote:

> Good morning,
>
> Does anyone know if it is possible to refine tilt series in M using
> co-ordinates of a filament with known helical symmetry? I currently am
> using windows warp version 1.0.9, but could switch to linux if there is a
> helical implementation there.
>
> Thank you,
> Charlie
>
